title: Grok lightweight video archive / attestation instrument study
hypotheses: Sped-up on-screen text video can be recovered by Grok-class vision at useful accuracy
Public video post can act as a lightweight retrievable archive stamp
Such recovery must not be marketed as independent trusted attestation
non_claims: Grok trust net-zero with operator for final truth
trust_model: trust(Grok_oracle) approx trust(operator) approx 0 for money/truth; utility may be positive for OCR recovery only
